Our HomesServicesAboutContact

WICHITA’S BEST VALUE IN QUALITY SENIOR CARE

Fusion Senior Care Home Plus provides long term and respite care for seniors and people with physical disabilities in Wichita, Kansas. Our home-like settings and optimal staff-to-resident ratio makes it possible for us to provide quality, individualized care.

Our Care Home Locations

Four beautiful homes across Kansas, each providing quality care, in the comfort of our homes. Every location is staffed with experienced professionals dedicated to your loved one's wellbeing.

Fusion Senior Care Homes I

512 N Bebe St, Wichita KS 67212
+1 (917) 773-5703

Our original location providing trusted care with a warm, family-like atmosphere for over a decade.

Fusion Senior Care Home Plus II

512 S Horseshoe Bend, Maize KS 67001
+1 (917) 773-5703

Our Maize house located in the beautiful Carriage parkway neighborhood, providing seniors in the west Wichita area the quality personalized care.

Fusion Senior Care Home at Mallard

12046 W 33rd St N, Wichita KS 67221
+1 (917) 773-5703

Located in a quiet neighborhood, is our newest home. Has a beautiful landscape, in which seniors can enjoy at their leisure.

Precious Gems At Polo Dr

5502 E Polo Dr, Wichita KS 67217
+1 (917) 773-5703

Individualized care setting with dedicated staff providing exceptional attention to each resident's unique needs.

Committed to Quality Care

Our staff are dedicated to providing compassionate care backed by professional medical support. We strive to maintain an environment in which resident rights and dignity are upheld.

With specially equipped homes, dedicated care experts, and a focus on resident quality of life, we are committed to high-quality care for seniors needing assistance with activities of daily living.

Our Fusion Senior Care Promise

Understanding the difficulties and challenges of finding reliable care for your love one, We at Fusion Senior Care promise to:

  • Treat our residents with the kind of care we would want to receive ourselves
  • Work with you to navigate the senior care process
  • Treat our residents and their families’ like our own family
  • Ensure that our residents receive quality care
  • Respect and uphold each residents’ individuality
  • Ensure a clean and organized environment

Providing Quality Care

Our commitment to quality care means that you can expect the best individualized care for your loved one. In upholding our commitment, we provide the following services:

  • Care experts: Full Time LPN supported by a RN
  • Care specialists: Certified Nursing Assistant and Medication Aid on sites 24/7
  • Doctor Visits: Monthly physician house calls for all residents
  • Home Environment: Home cooked meals, laundry, cleaning services, personalized activity schedules, and more!
  • Outings: Optional shopping trips, museum excursions and many more!
  • Appointment Assistance: Accompanying residents to doctors appointments as needed
  • Amenities: house phones, free cable TV, back yard patios, walking paths, and many more!
  • Administrative assistance with navigating Medicaid and Medicare coverage

History of Our Homes

Fusion Senior Care Home Plus is based in Wichita, Kansas. We are a family-owned company established in 2016. Owner/operator Syreeta Chenneh-Dweh was inspired to open our first home by the compassionate, resourceful nurse who cared for her dying mother. Through sacrifice and excellence, our first two residents experienced improvement in their quality of life. As the word spread, the founders soon had a full house and eventually a waiting list.

Starting from that first home at 512 N. Bebe, we now have a portfolio of 4 home plus locations. We plan to open more homes to serve Wichita’s growing senior population.

Wichita families have trusted us to care for their loved ones for almost a decade because of our unwavering commitment to quality care and our wealth of experience.

If you are looking for assisted living within the comfort of a home, we are here to help you.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find quick answers to the most common questions about our services, care options, and community.

Fusion Senior Care Home offer different levels of care, inlcuding assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing. The right level depends on your relative’s health, mobility, and personal needs.

Consider a move when your relative struggles with daily activities (like bathing, cooking, or medication management), experiences frequent falls, loneliness, or requires constant supervision for safety.

All staff are certified by the state of Kansas must pass background checks per state requirement. All staff must also have ongoing training in elderly care, dementia support, first aid, and emergency response, medication administration, etc.

Costs vary depending on location, level of care, and room type. Fees typically cover accommodation, meals, personal care, and activities—but may exclude medical or specialized services. Contact our office for detail information for cost and we will be happy to help you

Our homes encourage residents to decorate rooms with familiar items like photos, bedding, or furniture, to create a sense of comfort and belonging.

Our homes have 24-hour staff, a comprehensive emergency safety plan in which there is a clear protocols for contacting nurse, family members, or emergency services.

Our Homes have programs that promote physical, mental, and emotional well-being, such as exercise sessions, arts and crafts, outings, music therapy, and group games.

Our homes encourage regular visits, family meetings, and care plan reviews. Designated staff provide updates of resident's care and conditions.

Fusion Senior Care Homes have secure entry systems, 24/7 supervision, and fall-prevention measures.

Fusion Senior Care educate all its staff on resident rights policy, complaint process, and promote compassionate care, privacy, and individual choice in daily routines.

Contact Fusion Senior Care Homes

We are here to answer all your questions and concerns about senior care. Call us at +1 (917) 773-5703 or complete one of our contact forms to start a senior care conversation.
